testcase.name: NavigateForwardDemo
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: session not created: Chrome instance exited. Examine ChromeDriver verbose log to determine the cause. Host info: host: 'MacBook-Air-5.local', ip: 'fe80:0:0:0:105f:8867:a3a:3b2d%en0' Build info: version: '4.45.0', revision: 'cd6a3cd cd6a3cdfca6970f62e5bc8344109d0fe0e2af05e' System info: os.name: 'Mac
